stories.title: Create .dockerignore
stories.verification: File exists; grep confirms node_modules, dist, dist-ssr, .git, .gitignore, .env, .env.*, .claude, .omc, .vscode, *.md, *.log entries.
acceptanceCriteria: .dockerignore exists at project root
Excludes node_modules, dist, dist-ssr, .git, .gitignore, .env, .env.*, .claude, .omc, .vscode, *.md, *.log

stories.title: Create nginx.conf with SPA fallback + caching + security headers
stories.verification: File exists; grep confirms listen 80, root /usr/share/nginx/html, try_files SPA fallback, cache expires 1y + immutable, X-Frame-Options + X-Content-Type-Options.
acceptanceCriteria: nginx.conf exists at project root
server listens on 80 with root /usr/share/nginx/html
location / has 'try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html' SPA fallback
Static-asset location block sets 'expires 1y' and 'Cache-Control: public, immutable' for js/css/png/jpg/jpeg/gif/ico/svg/woff/woff2
Adds X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN and X-Content-Type-Options nosniff headers

stories.title: Create multi-stage Dockerfile
stories.verification: File exists; grep confirms FROM node:20-alpine AS builder, npm ci, npm run build, ARG/ENV GEMINI_API_KEY with comment, FROM nginx:alpine, conf+html paths, EXPOSE 80, HEALTHCHECK wget command.
acceptanceCriteria: Dockerfile exists at project root
Stage 1 uses node:20-alpine AS builder, runs npm ci then npm run build
ARG GEMINI_API_KEY="" + ENV GEMINI_API_KEY with explanatory comment about loadEnv promotion
Stage 2 uses nginx:alpine, copies nginx.conf to /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf and dist to /usr/share/nginx/html
EXPOSE 80
HEALTHCHECK runs 'wget -qO- http://localhost:80/' with --interval=30s --timeout=3s --start-period=5s --retries=3

stories.title: Create docker-compose.yml with db + web services
stories.verification: File exists; grep confirms no version key, postgres:16-alpine, cl-postgres container, port mapping, pgdata volume, pg_isready healthcheck, cl-web, GEMINI_API_KEY build arg, WEB_PORT:-8080 mapping, depends_on YAML comment, top-level pgdata + cl-network, FORWARD PATH block.
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose.yml exists at project root
No 'version:' key (Compose V2)
db service: image postgres:16-alpine, container_name cl-postgres, env POSTGRES_USER/PASSWORD/DB with defaults, ports ${POSTGRES_PORT:-5432}:5432, named volume pgdata, healthcheck via pg_isready
web service: build context . with GEMINI_API_KEY arg, container_name cl-web, ports ${WEB_PORT:-8080}:80 (not 3000)
web service does NOT have depends_on:db (replaced by explanatory YAML comment)
Top-level volumes: pgdata declared
Top-level networks: cl-network with driver bridge, both services attached
Forward-path comment block at end of file shows how to add an api service consuming Postgres

stories.title: Create .env.example with Security Warning
stories.verification: File exists; grep confirms POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_PORT, WEB_PORT, GEMINI_API_KEY and SECURITY WARNING block with build-time embedding warning.
acceptanceCriteria: .env.example exists at project root
Contains POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_PORT, WEB_PORT, GEMINI_API_KEY
Includes a SECURITY WARNING block above GEMINI_API_KEY explaining build-time embedding and recommending runtime entry via Settings or Ollama

stories.verification: grep -x confirms .env, .env.local, .env.*.local present. git check-ignore .env returns '.env'.

.gitignore contains '.env.local'
.gitignore contains '.env.*.local'
git check-ignore .env returns '.env' (verified after creating a dummy .env)

stories.title: Update README.md with Run-with-Docker-Compose section + Security Warning
stories.verification: grep confirms '## Run with Docker Compose', 'Security Warning', 'docker compose up', 'localhost:8080', 'docker compose exec db psql', 'docker compose down -v', 'Architecture Note'.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md has a new '## Run with Docker Compose' section
Section contains a prominent '## Security Warning' block above the steps warning about build-time GEMINI_API_KEY embedding
Section documents: cp .env.example .env, docker compose up -d --build, docker compose ps, http://localhost:8080, docker compose exec db psql, docker compose down [-v]
Section contains an Architecture Note explaining Postgres has no consumer today
Section grep matches: 'Run with Docker Compose', 'Security Warning', 'docker compose up', 'localhost:8080'

stories.title: Compose syntax validates and gitignore behaves correctly
stories.verification: 'docker compose config --quiet' exited 0. 'docker compose config --services' returned db,web. 'git check-ignore .env' returned '.env'. 'git ls-files .env' was empty.
acceptanceCriteria: 'docker compose config --quiet' exits 0
After creating a dummy .env, 'git check-ignore .env' returns '.env'
'git ls-files .env' returns empty

stories.title: End-to-end smoke: containers boot healthy and SPA serves
stories.verification: All 9 story-level acceptance criteria PASS. `docker compose up -d --build` exited 0; both containers reached healthy within 12s after fix below; pg_isready returned 0; psql 'SELECT 1' returned 1; curl HTTP/1.1 200 OK with X-Frame-Options + X-Content-Type-Options headers; body contained '<div id="root">' and 'Context Lattice' (2 occurrences); data persisted across down (without -v) + up cycle (seeded row 'persist-marker-9k3p' survived); `docker compose down -v` removed `cl_intelligent_orchestration_pgdata` volume cleanly (verified with --filter name=); zero .ts/.tsx files modified.
fixesAppliedDuringVerification: Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK: changed 'wget http://localhost:80/' to 'wget http://127.0.0.1:80/'. Root cause: BusyBox wget in nginx:alpine resolves 'localhost' to ::1 (IPv6) first, but our nginx config only listens on 0.0.0.0:80 (IPv4), so the healthcheck got Connection refused. The functional path through 0.0.0.0:8088 (host) -> container :80 was always working; only the in-container loopback was IPv6/IPv4 mismatched. Single-character fix; no nginx.conf change needed.

.env WEB_PORT changed from 8080 to 8088. Root cause: host port 8080 was already allocated by an unrelated container (videodoc-whisper-gpu from a different project). .env.example default (8080) was kept; .env is gitignored so this override does not affect future setups.
deviationsFromPlan: Final image size is 93.7MB (multi-arch manifest list amd64+arm64), not the <50MB target in the plan's general acceptance list. This story's ACs did not include the <50MB threshold; a single-platform amd64 image is roughly half of 93.7MB. Acceptable for local dev; revisit with `--platform linux/amd64` if size is critical.
deferredHandoff_RESOLVED: After system restart, from project root run: cp .env.example .env (if not present)
docker compose config --quiet  # should already pass (verified earlier)
Wait ~60s, then: docker compose ps  # both services should be (healthy)
docker compose exec db pg_isready -U context_lattice
docker compose exec db psql -U context_lattice -d context_lattice -c 'SELECT 1'
acceptanceCriteria: 'docker compose up -d --build' exits 0
Both containers reach 'healthy' state within 90s
'docker compose exec db pg_isready -U context_lattice' returns 0
'docker compose exec db psql -U context_lattice -d context_lattice -c "SELECT 1"' returns 1
'curl -sI http://localhost:8080' returns HTTP 200
'curl -fsS http://localhost:8080' body contains '<div id="root">'
'curl -fsS http://localhost:8080' body contains 'Context Lattice'
'docker compose down -v' exits 0 and removes the pgdata volume
No .ts or .tsx files were modified during this implementation
